scripts.release: make ci && VERSION=$(git cliff --bumped-version) && SEMVER=${VERSION#v} && git cliff --bump -o CHANGELOG.md && npm version "$SEMVER" --no-git-tag-version && cd frontend && npm version "$SEMVER" --no-git-tag-version && cd .. && git add CHANGELOG.md package.json package-lock.json frontend/package.json && git commit -m "chore(release): $VERSION" && git tag "$VERSION"
